comment: Edit and rebuild: python3 build_dashboard.py. Any subset can be omitted to fall back to defaults in build_dashboard.py.

artistAliases._comment: Map canonical display name -> [variants to merge into this group]. Auto-normalization (lowercase, strip punctuation/spaces) already collapses TWICE/Twice, Girls' Generation/Girls Generation, T-ara/T ARA, etc. — use this only for cross-language or cross-romanization merges that no algorithm can catch.
